NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. ON 3/25/10 DEFENDANT REJECTED PLAINTIFF'S LATE CLAIM APPLICATION AND HE HAD SIX MONTHS FROM THAT DATE TO SEEK RELIEF FROM THE COURT. IN THE REJECTION LETTER, DEFENDANT WARNED PLAINTIFF THAT HE NEEDED TO FILE A PETITION FOR RELIEF WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANTS ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT (COPY MAILED TO DEFENDANTS).
